mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.title, e.course_name, e.start_time, e.end_time, e.duration, e.total_score, e.status FROM exam e WHERE e.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND e.is_deleted = 0
AND e.status = 1
AND e.status = 2
ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_submission WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status = 1
